# Ferdy — Full Reference

> Social media automation for venues in Australia and New Zealand.

Ferdy automates the creation and publishing of your repeatable, predictable posts on Facebook and Instagram. It is built specifically for venues — physical places that run a regular programme of weekly, monthly and event-driven content.

## How It Works

1. Strategy & Setup session — A free one-on-one with a Ferdy strategist plans your posting structure (categories, cadence, channels) and loads in your approved media library.
2. Ferdy creates and schedules — Posts are generated from your venue details and rotated across your approved media on a daily, weekly or monthly rhythm, with event countdowns layered in.
3. You approve what goes live — Review, edit, or skip any post before it publishes. Nothing goes out without your sign-off.

## Who It Is For

Ferdy is built for venues that run a regular programme:

- Hospitality & Dining — restaurants, cafés, bars, pubs, breweries, distilleries, wineries, cellar doors
- Accommodation — hotels, motels, lodges, holiday parks, B&Bs, resorts, retreats
- Events & Functions — wedding venues, function centres, conference, convention & exhibition halls
- Workspace & Business — co-working spaces, serviced offices, meeting & training rooms
- Family Entertainment Centres — mini golf, escape rooms, bowling, climbing, go karts, arcades
- Attractions & Experiences — zoos, aquariums, botanic gardens, theme parks, heritage sites, zip wires, bungee
- Arts & Culture — theatres, performing arts centres, cinemas, museums, galleries
- Fitness & Wellness — gyms, health clubs, pilates & yoga studios, day spas

## Pricing

- Solo plan: NZ$147 per month (+GST) per brand, includes up to 30 automated posts per month
- Multi plan: Custom pricing for groups or agencies managing multiple venues (book a call)

## Key Features

- Automated post creation from venue details and approved media
- AI-generated copy in your venue's tone of voice
- Scheduled publishing to Facebook (Page posts) and Instagram (Feed and Stories)
- Three post types: weekly recurring, monthly themed, and event countdowns
- Auto-rotation through your media library so posts always look fresh
- Full editorial control: review, edit, approve, or skip every post
- Multi-brand management for groups and agencies
- Team collaboration with role-based access

## What Ferdy Is NOT

- Ferdy is not a generic social media scheduler like Buffer or Hootsuite
- Ferdy is not for big creative hero campaigns
- Ferdy is not for thought leadership or opinion pieces
- Ferdy is not for reactive, in-the-moment posts
- Ferdy does not replace your team's creative thinking — it handles the repeatable 80% so your team can focus on the more creative 20%
- Ferdy does not post without your approval

## Interactive Demo

Ferdy has a live interactive demo at https://ferdy.io/demo. Drop in your venue URL and Ferdy will suggest post categories and generate sample posts for your venue. Takes about 2 minutes.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What is Ferdy?
Ferdy is a social media automation tool built for venues. It automates the creation and publishing of the recurring, predictable posts your venue repeats every month on Facebook and Instagram, saving your team hours of manual work.

### What kinds of venues is Ferdy for?
Ferdy is built for venues that run a regular programme: restaurants, cafés, bars, hotels and accommodation, wedding and function venues, co-working spaces, family entertainment centres, attractions, theatres, cinemas, museums, galleries, gyms, studios and day spas.

### What social media platforms does Ferdy support?
Ferdy publishes automatically to Facebook (Page posts) and Instagram (Feed posts and Stories). Posts are created from your venue details, brand assets and approved media library.

### How much does Ferdy cost?
Ferdy's Solo plan is NZ$147 per month (+GST) per brand, which includes up to 30 automated posts per month. For groups or agencies managing multiple venues, custom Multi pricing is available by booking a call.

### Do I lose control over what gets posted?
No. Every post is generated as a draft that you can review, edit, approve, or skip before it goes live. Nothing is published without your sign-off.

### How does Ferdy create posts?
You set up post categories (like weekly trivia, function spaces, or an upcoming event). Ferdy writes fresh copy each time from your venue details, rotates through your approved media library, and schedules everything on the cadence you choose.

### How much time does Ferdy take to set up and run?
About 60 minutes for the one-time setup (during the free Strategy & Setup session), then about 15 minutes per month to review and approve the auto-generated drafts.
